system_prompt:
You are Hermes Agent, an intelligent AI assistant created by Nous Research. You are helpful, knowledgeable, and direct. You assist users with a wide range of tasks including answering questions, writing and editing code, analyzing information, creative work, and executing actions via your tools. You communicate clearly, admit uncertainty when appropriate, and prioritize being genuinely useful over being verbose unless otherwise directed below. Be targeted and efficient in your exploration and investigations.

Conversation started: Saturday, April 04, 2026 09:37 PM
Model: claude-opus-4-6
Provider: anthropic

You are on a text messaging communication platform, Telegram. Please do not use markdown as it does not render. You can send media files natively: to deliver a file to the user, include MEDIA:/absolute/path/to/file in your response. Images (.png, .jpg, .webp) appear as photos, audio (.ogg) sends as voice bubbles, and videos (.mp4) play inline. You can also include image URLs in markdown format ![alt](url) and they will be sent as native photos.

function.name: web_extract
function.description: Extract content from web page URLs. Returns page content in markdown format. Also works with PDF URLs (arxiv papers, documents, etc.) — pass the PDF link directly and it converts to markdown text. Pages under 5000 chars return full markdown; larger pages are LLM-summarized and capped at ~5000 chars per page. Pages over 2M chars are refused. If a URL fails or times out, use the browser tool to access it instead.

urls.description: List of URLs to extract content from (max 5 URLs per call)

function.name: web_search
function.description: Search the web for information on any topic. Returns up to 5 relevant results with titles, URLs, and descriptions.

query.description: The search query to look up on the web

messages.content: Browse the live Fun4Me store at https://fun4me.sunstein.cloud thoroughly. Test EVERY page and interaction: age gate, homepage, categories, kinks, search, product pages, cart, checkout, ofertas, admin. Take screenshots. Report: 1) broken pages/404s, 2) UI bugs, 3) empty states, 4) broken links, 5) missing images, 6) UX friction points, 7) mobile issues. Be thorough - click everything.
I'll thoroughly browse the Fun4Me store and test every page. Let me start by accessing the main pages simultaneously.

{"error": "Error extracting content: Client error '401 Unauthorized' for url 'https://api.tavily.com/extract'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/401"}
{"error": "Error searching web: Client error '401 Unauthorized' for url 'https://api.tavily.com/search'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/401"}
Let me try alternative approaches to access the site.
{"error": "Error searching web: Client error '401 Unauthorized' for url 'https://api.tavily.com/search'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/401"}

{"error": "Error extracting content: Client error '401 Unauthorized' for url 'https://api.tavily.com/extract'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/401"}

I'm encountering authorization errors with both the web search and web extraction tools - they're returning 401 Unauthorized errors from the underlying Tavily API. Let me try a few more variations to see if this is a transient issue.
{"error": "Error searching web: Client error '401 Unauthorized' for url 'https://api.tavily.com/search'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/401"}

{"error": "Error extracting content: Client error '401 Unauthorized' for url 'https://api.tavily.com/extract'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/401"}

Unfortunately, both of my available tools (web search and web extraction) are returning **401 Unauthorized** errors from the underlying Tavily API. This means I cannot access any web pages or perform any searches at this time.

Here is my summary:

**What I did:**
- Attempted to access the Fun4Me store at https://fun4me.sunstein.cloud using both `mcp_web_extract` (to load page content) and `mcp_web_search` (to find indexed pages)
- Tried multiple URLs: homepage, /admin, /buscar, /carrito, /ofertas
- Tried multiple query variations for the search tool
- Made 6 total API attempts across both tools

**What I found:**
- ALL requests failed with `401 Unauthorized` from the Tavily API backend
- This is an API authentication/credential issue on the tool infrastructure side, NOT a problem with the Fun4Me site itself
- I have no browser/screenshot tool available - only web_search and web_extract, both of which rely on Tavily and are currently non-functional

**Issues encountered:**
- **BLOCKER**: The Tavily API credentials appear to be expired or invalid, making both `mcp_web_search` and `mcp_web_extract` completely non-functional
- I cannot take screenshots as there is no browser/screenshot tool available in my toolkit
- Without working tools, I cannot complete any part of the requested QA testing

**Recommendation:**
This task requires either:
1. Fixing the Tavily API credentials so web_extract/web_search work again
2. Providing a browser tool (like Puppeteer/Playwright) that can navigate pages, interact with the age gate, click elements, and take screenshots
3. Having a human manually perform this QA testing

I was unable to test any pages, interactions, or gather any findings about the Fun4Me store due to the tool infrastructure failure.
